description: Composition Rust printed top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, panel stitched at the sides and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every woman needs an ethnic top in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this piece we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with jeans and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
